positive_prompt: cyberpunk night city, pitch-black sky; dense neon + holograms; rain-slick reflections, bloom, volumetric beams, 4K, 8K, UHD, photoreal, high-contrast.
negative_prompt: blur/low-res/artifacts, oversaturation, cartoon/3D-render look, duplicates, floating objects, new objects
verification_prompt: cyberpunk style, game like image, high quality, sharp, no artifacts, no floating objects
